user_system_path: Issue #208 is the active Product MVP seam. ACTIVE_HANDOFF.md and FOLDERA_BUILD_ORDER.yaml must point at the same issue, and issue #178 must be suspended/queued while the queue file remains inactive/reference-only.
no_routing_contract: The Agent must read ACTIVE_HANDOFF.md, FOLDERA_BUILD_ORDER.yaml, .foldera-contract.json, and docs/SOURCE_OF_TRUTH_MAP.md before acting, and must follow the active issue exactly. The Agent may not ask Brandon to route, repeat, or arbitrate the queue.

terminal_state_authority.merge_through_rule: Merge-through is allowed only after local proof, GitHub checks green, forbidden work touched is NO, and the PR receipt records the source-truth closeout and terminal state.

allowed_files_raw: Issue #208 now authorizes the first user journey shell at app/dashboard/page.tsx while the repo stays pointed at the active Product MVP seam.
forbidden_files_raw: No live Slack, no Supabase migrations or data mutation, no Vercel settings, no Stripe/auth work, no package/dependency changes, no queue activation, no Dependabot, no live connector fetch, no paid/model call, no fake claims, and no broad cleanup outside the dashboard shell seam.
required_browser_proof: Authenticated browser render of /dashboard at desktop and mobile.
acceptance_condition: ACTIVE_HANDOFF.md, FOLDERA_BUILD_ORDER.yaml, docs/SOURCE_OF_TRUTH_MAP.md, .foldera-contract.json, and the gate/test layer all agree that issue #208 is the active Product MVP seam, issue #178 is suspended/queued, issue #140 is closed by PR #206, issue #168 is completed/superseded, issue #182 is completed and closed, issue #165 is capture-only, and the queue file remains inactive/reference-only. No product/runtime implementation starts in this change.
stop_condition: Stop when the source-truth closeout and gate/test layer both accept issue #208 as active with issue #178 suspended/queued, issue #140 closed/completed, issue #168 closed/completed, and no queue activation.
anti_regression_checks: issue #208 is the active Product MVP seam
No product/runtime implementation starts in the governance patch
next_command: Continue issue #208 Build the first user journey shell and keep issue #178 suspended/queued until any future activation.
